div.p: Container init process responsibility for orphaned children

div.h2: What happens when PID 1 doesn't reap:

ol.li: Zombies persist indefinitely — cannot be killed (already dead)
Process table slots consumed — each zombie uses kernel memory
PID exhaustion — system cannot create new processes
No cleanup possible — even kill -9 has no effect on zombies

ul.li: Orphaned children are reparented to PID 1
PID 1 inherits ALL orphans in its namespace
Only PID 1 can reap these inherited children

text.tspan: // SIGCHLD handler - triggered on child state change
// WNOHANG: return immediately if no child has exited
// ECHILD means no children left — expected, not error
// SIGCHLD handler - triggered on child state change
// WNOHANG: return immediately if no child has exited
// ECHILD means no children left — expected, not error

div.p: PID STATE PPID COMM 1 S (sleep) 0 init 42 Z (zombie) 1 worker 43 Z (zombie) 1 worker 44 Z (zombie) 1 worker
PID STATE PPID COMM 1 S (sleep) 0 init
